title: 3D Item Icons
description: Gives 3D item models to certain items. Consistent with Create!
body:
This pack adds 3D item models to various items, including modded ones! :3

Check out the gallery!

Suggestions/Questions/Complaints are encouraged btw! You can message me on discord

<details>
<summary>*Currently supported mods:*</summary>

-Architect's Palette

-Bountiful Fares

-Buzzier Bees

-Caverns & Chasms

-Create Deco

-Dye Depot

-The Endergetic Expansion

-Hearth & Home

-Immersive Weathering

-Naturalist

-Oreganized

-Quark

-Species

-Supplementaries

-Supplementaries squared

-Upgrade Aquatic


</details>
